name: Cabbeen Fashion Limited
summary: Cabbeen Fashion Limited manufactures, purchases and sells apparel and accessories for men, women, and children under the Cabbeen, Cabbeen Urban, Cabbeen Love and 2AM brands in the People's Republic of China. As of December 31, 2020, it operated approximately 810 retail shops through a network of 7 wholesale distributors, 20 consignment distributors, and 115 sub distributors in Mainland China, and one retail shop in Cambodia. The company also sells its products through online shops, such as WeChat store, T-mall, JD.com, and vipshop; and to other online distributors, as well as franchise stores. It is also involved in the real estate development, properties holding, and trademark holding activities; and manufacturing and sale of personal protective equipment. The company is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
